requirements.description: The Cursor adapter shall satisfy the shared offline adapter baseline, publish a bounded compatibility descriptor and evidence-accurate EXPERIMENTAL maturity without requiring a live surface runtime, map every available host operation without reimplementing core semantics, and fail closed for absent capabilities; only the separate optional live promotion route may mark it VERIFIED.
